title: neoporteria curvispina var. kesselringiana
intro: Neoporteria curvispina var. kesselringiana, also known as the Kesselring's prickly pear, is a cactus species belonging to the Opuntia genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include wound healing, skin protection, and potential treatments for diabetes and certain cancers. Herbal preparations of Neoporteria curvispina var. kesselringiana can be made into ointments, gels, or teas, and are often used topically to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
